title: Yibaijia 4 Pack Water Container, 5L Collapsible Drinking Car Water Carrier Container, Outdoor Folding Water Bag for Sport, Hiking, Camping, BBQ, Picnic(Blue)
features: 【Premium Material】The 5l camping water containers are made of food-grade premium material, which is BPA free, non-toxic, environmentally friendly, and durable for long time use. Robust thick handles, wide large screw cap closure, wide bottle lip, which is very easy to fill and pour.

【Space Saving ＆ Portable】Our folding water container is lightweight, you can roll the drinking water container up for easy storage and carry, water bag is reusable. This collapsible design makes car water carrier container easy for travel and storage, which takes up little space.

【Easy to Use】Simply place our folding water bags under the tap, fill with water and watch the tank grow to its full size. Once full to its capacity, our water container is then ready for easy instant use. The collapsible water container holds up to 5 liters, which is good for you use on different occasions.

【Wide Applications】Our collapsible water bag has many uses. Ideal for use on the campsite, whilst hiking, climbing, outdoor travel, and on those long car journeys. Good for household, camping, garden, cemetery, vacation, hiking, hunting, travel, picnic, barbecue, BBQ, and more.

【After-Sales Service】The collapsible water container folds easily for space-saving carrying and storage. For our car water container, you will get 100% customer support. If you have any questions about the water container, please feel free to contact us. We are committed to providing you with a satisfactory customer experience.
description: Product Description Our water bags are not only practical but also beautiful. The simple appearance makes your eyes shine. The foldable design allows you to easily store it in backpacks, handbags, and luggage. It is also equipped with a convenient water outlet and sealing cover, allowing you to replenish water at any time. Portable and practical BPA-free soft polymer material Lightweight, foldable, takes up little space, outdoor drinking tool Can be used as a mobile water tank or vehicle water tank Can hold various drinks: soy milk milk Vegetable juice, fruit juice, etc. product information: Capacity: 5L Weight: 224g color: blue Product size: 330*295mm material: plastic Foldable easy to store and carry, does not take up space Enlarged water injection port The pocket is enlarged, making it easier to fill and discharge water. It is made of plastic, so please feel free to use it. Thickened handle Free hanging buckle, can be hung on a backpack, wear-resistant and thickened handle, easy to carry without tying your hands. Suitable for outdoor camping, holding domestic water, solid material, convenient foldable belt, can be used as a mobile water tank or car water tank It is more convenient than traditional plastic water tanks and can be used as an emergency water bag in case of water outage. In an emergency, it can be used as a gasoline bag.
